system.description:
You’ve become important enough that your patron has given you a direct line. You gain the following benefits:

  • Your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma increases by 1, to a maximum of 20.

  • Choose a skill from Arcana or Religion that you are proficient with. It gains an expertise die and your maximum expertise die size for the selected skill becomes a d12.

  • You gain proficiency with your choice of Alchemist’s Supplies, Calligrapher’s Supplies, Disguise kits, Herbalism kits, Poisoner’s kits, or Thieves’ tools.

  • Your patron provides you with a token to contact them. When you acquire the token, determine whether it casts @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-spells.Item.h5ssew7apf5ofbhc]{Commune}, @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-spells.Item.pdwrag8eq7r0ldcp]{Commune with Nature}, or @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-spells.Item.59she20yqbp2giqq]{Contact Other Plane}. Once per long rest, you can use the token to cast the selected spell without material components (if applicable). Regardless of the spell selected, the entity contacted through the token is always your patron.

Once you have selected this feat, you can no longer gain levels in classes other than warlock.
system.prerequisite: 12 levels in warlock, Bolstered Bargainer feat, Pactsworn feat, no levels in non-warlock classes at the time of feat acquisition
